problem.headline: Why knowledge alone is not enough
problem.card1Text: Your team knows what to do — but the numbers stagnate. More knowledge no longer brings breakthroughs.
problem.card2Text: The gap between what has been learned and what is actually done is the most expensive gap in any business.
problem.card3Text: No clear process, no reproducibility — everyone does sales somehow, but no one does it systematically.
